channel.title: Lifeboat — survival guides for sinking software
channel.description: SaaS shutdown deadlines, export steps, and migration guides.

item.title: Garnix is shutting down — survival guide
item.description: Hosted CI and caching for Nix projects — flake checks, multi-arch builds, deploy previews

item.title: Microsoft Publisher is shutting down — survival guide
item.description: Microsoft's desktop-publishing app for flyers, newsletters, and bulletins since 1991
